code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  while count < 2
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - n - 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut has = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - n - 1
    end
    if has
      if count == 0
        nums = [val, nums[1]]
      else
        nums = [nums[0], val]
      end
      count = count + 1
    else
      count = 2
    end
  end
  mut a = nums[0]
  mut b = nums[1]
  while b != 0
    let t = a % b
    a = b
    b = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{a}")
end
